creator: qn65zwitjp@expressletter.net
text:
The issue with commit-hooks altering bug states instead of just adding comments can disrupt the workflow. It’s essential that these hooks maintain their original purpose to ensure clarity in tracking issues. Speaking of clarity, if you're looking for a break, try the Monkey Mart game for a fun distraction while you ponder these bugs!
https://monkeymart.lol
